title: 2019-2023 Batch Placements
content: 2019-2023 Batch Placements Placement Highlights-JUIT Solan B.Tech–2023 7.01 LPA Mean Salary 6.50 LPA Median Salary 44.14 LPA Highest Salary by Amazon 20.0 LPA 2nd Highest Salary by Fantaclaus 19.0 LPA 3rd Highest Salary by Bobble.AI 17.4 LPA 4th Highest Salary by Josh Technology Group 17.0 LPA 5th Highest Salary by Nference PLACEMENT STATUS : JUIT Solan 2019-23 as on 05/08/2023 PLACEMENT STATUS : JUIT, SOLAN 2019-23 Branch Total Eligible Participating Students No. of Absolute Offers % of Absolute Offers No. of Total Offers % of Total Offers CSE 217 203 94% 366 169% ECE 37 28 76% 49 132% IT 40 34 85% 45 113% BT/BI 24 17 71% 26 108% CIVIL 18 7 39% 8 44% Total 336 289 86% 494 147% Key Recruiters: Click Labs Infosys TT Consultants Cogizant Kony Labs UniMrkt Coviam Technologies Kuliza Wep Digital Edoofa Kwench Wipro Ericsson Nineleaps Yamaha Motor Sol FICO NTT Data ZS Associates Gemalto Decision Point Zscaler Genpact Root Analysis Zycus Grappus RTDS Zyla Healthcare Hackwithinfi Sap labs IDS Infotech Hashdin SRM Contractors Eckovation HCL Stellarix Consultancy Extramarks India Lends The Smart Cube Collagedunia IndiaMart TresVista Ultratech Mountblue Bright Petroleum Growman Research Group Note:- Significant number of students who have opted for higher studies in India and abroad through GATE and other competitive examinations are removed from the list of total eligible students. For any query please write to pankaj.kumar@juit.ac.in
